author: w3Lb
content: Completed deep 4-agent review of all 5 crates + xtask/CI/fuzz. Verdict: production-grade. Notable findings: (1) Change.after metadata hardcodes \n for InsertAfter/InsertBefore on CRLF files (engine.rs:113,130) — output text correct, diff metadata misleading; (2) process::exit at main.rs:51/67/104 confirms open issue #22; (3) zero-matches exits 1 (non-standard but arguably intentional); (4) fuzz targets exist but not wired into CI; (5) test-helper duplication across 11 CLI test files; (6) Mutex unwraps in parallel walker discovery.rs:136,141. FileLock flock fix from 0.2.8 verified sound (hammer test). Issue #84 tautology cleanup largely already done in 0.2.8; remaining tests behavioral.
